title: Dorry and Brogy’s Endless Duel — Part 6
description: On pages 19–19, dorry and brogy’s endless duel — part 6 as the giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means.
scene: Dorry and Brogy’s Endless Duel — Part 6. The giants’ proud battle becomes the center of the island as the Straw Hats learn what Elbaf honor means. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I see... well that's a shame but I guess that also means that I've still got a chance to shine.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So don't worry! Now that the sleeping prince has awoken, your safety is guaranteed.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: wow...... .. .. .. I'm glad I slept through all that!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well you can count on me to back you up! The whole world's talking about whether or not the 30 million bounty isn't actually for my head instead!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I wonder if it's gonna snow...

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You just don't know because you were sleeping when it was snowing the other day.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Why the hell would it snow?

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Do ya think it'll snow some more?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on dorry and brogy’s endless duel — part 6. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
